name: Oil-Free Dill Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a screw-top jar, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover the jar tightly.
3. Shake well to mix all ingredients thoroughly.
4. Chill in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
5. Give the dressing a final shake before serving.
6. The recipe yields approximately 1 1/4 cups of dressing.
